pairs.question: What did Alice order?
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT o.* FROM orders o JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE u.name = 'Alice'

pairs.question: Who bought a Laptop?
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT u.* FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE p.name = 'Laptop'

pairs.question: Who bought a Mouse?
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT u.* FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE p.name = 'Mouse'

pairs.question: Orders in the last 7 days
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'

pairs.question: Users joined this year
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM users WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM NOW())

pairs.question: Revenue today
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT SUM(total_amount) FROM orders WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE

pairs.question: Orders from yesterday
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day'

pairs.question: Orders older than 30 days
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'

pairs.question: Count orders this month
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM created_at) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM NOW()) AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM NOW())

pairs.question: First order date
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT MIN(created_at) FROM orders

pairs.question: Latest order date
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT MAX(created_at) FROM orders

pairs.question: Average orders per day
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) / COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(created_at)) FROM orders

pairs.question: Days since first user joined
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT CURRENT_DATE - DATE(MIN(created_at)) FROM users

pairs.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM products WHERE name ILIKE '%book%'

pairs.question: Orders with 0 amount
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE total_amount = 0

pairs.question: Users without orders
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT u.* FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.id IS NULL

pairs.question: Products never sold
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT p.* FROM products p LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id WHERE oi.id IS NULL

pairs.question: Top 3 most expensive products
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM products ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 3

pairs.question: Users sorted by name reverse
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY name DESC

pairs.question: Second most expensive product
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM products ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1

pairs.question: Total quantity of all items sold
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT SUM(quantity) FROM order_items

pairs.question: Average item quantity per order
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT AVG(quantity) FROM order_items

pairs.question: Users with more than 2 orders
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT user_id FROM orders GROUP BY user_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 2
